title: Implement Google Gemini provider (replace dev stub)
intent: Replace the Google provider dev stub with a real implementation that calls the Gemini API via the network adapter, retrieves the API key from SecretStore, and returns a proper LlmInferResult. Follow the established Anthropic provider pattern.
acceptance_criteria: executeLlmInfer calls adapters.network.fetchHttp() to POST to generativelanguage.googleapis.com
Request body maps prompt to Gemini contents[].parts[].text format
Response parses candidates[].content.parts[].text into content string
Usage metadata (promptTokenCount, candidatesTokenCount) mapped to LlmInferResult.usage
No stub field in return value
Handler registered in CLI demo.ts buildHandlerMap() and desktop main/index.ts buildDesktopHandlerMap()
Provider test suite follows ANT-U pattern (manifest validation, handler correctness, error handling)
